general_inquiry.question: Find all real solutions to $\left| 8 x-\frac{1}{2}\right| =\frac{99}{4}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The real solutions to the equation \(\left| 8x-\frac{1}{2}\right| = \frac{99}{4}\) are:

\[ x = \frac{13}{16} \quad \text{and} \quad x = -\frac{11}{8} \]
